title: Lazy Plum Bliss
description: A dairy-free lazy-sunday Spanish dish featuring plum tomatoes that are slow-cooked to perfection for a delicious and comforting meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup grated Parmesan (or vegan alternative)
ingredients.notes: optional for added texture and umami

instructions: Place diced plum tomato in a mixing bowl.
Add minced garlic, nutritional yeast (if using), salt, black pepper, olive oil, basil leaves, and Parmesan (or vegan alternative) to the bowl with the tomatoes.
Mix all ingredients together until evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture onto an oven-safe plate or shallow baking dish.
Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for about 25-30 minutes, or until the mixture is warm and slightly crispy on top.
Serve immediately as a side dish or dessert.
